name: sux-vault
description: Registers the personal Obsidian-vault MCP connector (/vault/mcp): read/list/write/append/edit/delete, capture, and daily-note tools over the git-backed knowledge store — a focused namespace kept SEPARATE from the universal `sux` connector so the vault tools don't clutter the general web/data/compute surface. Same Worker, same OAuth (login-gated); it is a second endpoint, not a second server.
